heading: Injunction
label: 283 Injunction
text: The several courts having jurisdiction of cases under this title may grant injunctions in accordance with the principles of equity to prevent the violation of any right secured by patent, on such terms as the court deems reasonable.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 35, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 70, part (R.S. 4921, amended (1) , , (2) , , (3) , ).Mar. 3, 1897, ch. 391, § 629 Stat. 694Feb. 18, 1922, ch. 58, § 842 Stat. 392Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 726, § 160 Stat. 778This section is the same as the provision which opens R.S. 4921 with minor changes in language.
